query:
SELECT poNumber,
       COUNT(*) AS productCount,
       SUM(CASE WHEN productCode LIKE 'RESTORED-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS restoredProductCount,
       MIN(createdAt) AS firstCreatedAt,
       MAX(createdAt) AS lastCreatedAt
FROM products
WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260508-01'
GROUP BY poNumber;

       COUNT(*) AS productCount,
       SUM(CASE WHEN productCode LIKE 'RESTORED-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS restoredProductCount,
       MIN(createdAt) AS firstCreatedAt,
       MAX(createdAt) AS lastCreatedAt
